title: Prestwick Airport: Swinney Requests UK Government Discussion on US Military Operations

sections.heading: Meeting Request
sections.content: Scottish Finance Secretary John Swinney has called for a meeting with the UK Government to discuss the use of Prestwick Airport by the US military.

sections.heading: Recent Military Transit
sections.content: The request comes after three US military planes arrived at Prestwick Airport during their journey to the Middle East.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Prestwick Airport: Swinney seeks UK Government meeting on US military use of airport
